code-with-quarkus_3/src/main/java/org/ac.general_idea: Change the REST resource path from /hello to /hello2 to avoid conflicts or for versioning.
Removed verbose Javadoc comment block from the entity class.
code-with-quarkus_3/src/main/java/org/ac.human_impl: Deleted the multi-line comment explaining PanacheEntity usage and active record pattern.

code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Renamed the Maven artifact ID from 'code-with-quarkus' to 'build-perf-karm' to reflect a new project identity.
Changed the project version from '1.0.0-SNAPSHOT' to '1.0.0' to mark a stable release.
Added vertx-auth-jwt dependency to support JWT authentication features.
Added quarkus-jdbc-mariadb dependency to enable MariaDB database connectivity.
Added quarkus-smallrye-fault-tolerance dependency to implement resilience patterns.
Added quarkus-smallrye-jwt dependency to handle JWT security.
Added quarkus-smallrye-metrics dependency to expose application metrics.
Added quarkus-smallrye-health dependency to provide health check endpoints.
Added quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency to generate OpenAPI documentation.
Added quarkus-smallrye-opentracing dependency to enable distributed tracing.
Added quarkus-rest-client-reactive dependency to support reactive REST client calls.
Defined a property for the vertx-auth-jwt version to manage dependency versions centrally.
